title: Exoplanet Transit Monitoring
objectives: Detect periodic dips in brightness from selected host stars.
description: A long-term monitoring project focused on transit timing and confirmation.

collaborations.details: Transit data comparison and shared observation windows.

title: Variable Star Brightness Survey
objectives: Measure seasonal magnitude changes in known variable stars.
description: Students and staff collect repeated brightness measurements across months.

title: Nebula Spectral Mapping
objectives: Compare emission lines across several bright nebulae.
description: Spectral data is used to identify chemical composition differences.

title: Asteroid Motion Tracking
objectives: Estimate trajectories from repeated positional measurements.
description: A project devoted to imaging and logging near-Earth asteroid movement.

collaborations.details: Student participation in asteroid tracking exercises.

title: Galaxy Imaging Archive
objectives: Build a catalog of high-resolution galaxy photographs.
description: Creates a searchable archive of processed deep sky galaxy images.

collaborations.details: Archive hosting and public image gallery support.

title: Lunar Surface Change Study
objectives: Document visible lighting and shadow changes on the moon.
description: Observation sessions track recurring features over multiple lunar phases.

title: Comet Tail Evolution
objectives: Observe structural changes in comet tails over time.
description: Combines imaging and observational notes during active comet periods.

collaborations.details: Comet outreach exhibit and imaging coordination.

title: Meteor Shower Rate Analysis
objectives: Estimate hourly meteor rates during major shower peaks.
description: Public and internal observations contribute counts and weather context.

collaborations.details: Meteor count comparison across observation sites.

title: Solar Spot Activity Review
objectives: Track sunspot counts and imaging summaries.
description: Solar observations are compiled into a quarterly activity report.

collaborations.details: Solar report review and instrument benchmarking.

title: Open Cluster Photometry
objectives: Measure star brightness distributions in open clusters.
description: Photometry data supports educational analysis and publication practice.
